The '''''Limping Lady''''' was a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] light [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] which had been owned several times by [[Sithless Leethe]].

==History==

Some time during its life the vessel was fitted with a [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass-driver cannon]]. This was most probably done early in the ''Lady's'' life, as this weapon was outdated by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. This weapon drew immense amounts of energy whenever it fired its projectile-based ammunition; unfortunately this would cause another of the ship's primary systems to power down; this could be the shields, the [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]], the [[Navigation computer/Legends|nav computer]], the [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]], or the vessel's maneuvering thrusters.<ref name="Limping Lady" />

The ''Lady'' was in the possession of Sithless Leethe when a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] wannabe's came to [[Docking Bay 35]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], where he was selling the ship, sometime during the Galactic Civil War. Prior to this, Leethe had sold the ship to at least two other people; a "Squid-face" who had used it as a pleasure yacht before retiring to [[Eridicon IV]], and another owner who hadn't been able to keep up payments for the ship and was terminated. Sithless sold the ''Lady'' to the group for 25,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], which he informed them they could make in payments if they gave him a 5,000 credit down payment at that time. The only other condition of this sale was that the group took the ''Lady'' to [[Zoma V]] with its current cargo. What he did not tell them was that this cargo was ten metal crated full of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] weapons.<ref name="Limping Lady" />

Unfortunately, before this group managed to board the ''Lady'', it was impounded by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. The group somehow managed to get past the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] and boarded the ship where they found [[Slopper]], one of Leethe's thugs, and took off from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] without gaining permission. When the ship left the planets atmosphere, it was immediately contacted by both [[Hawker Bryce-Kelley|Hawker Bryce-Kelly]] in the ''[[Queen's Victory]]'' whom they had arranged to race to Zoma V, and the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] ''[[Belligerent]]'' and [[Vengeance (Tatooine)|''Vengeance'']], who ordered the group to land the ship back in Docking Bay 35. The group did not comply with these orders, however, and so the ''Vengeance'' ordered them to stand by and prepare to be boarded. Luckily, the group managed to escape after fighting four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], and escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], fleeing to Zoma V.<ref name="Limping Lady" />

When they arrived in the [[Zoma system/Legends|Zoma system]], they were contacted by Bryce-Kelly who offered them drinks if they came aboard his ship, where they would also finalize their bet. Sometime after this, the ''Lady'' was used by the group to deliver a [[data cartridge]] to the Rebel's [[Reginard Base]] on the planet [[Reginard]]. It is thought that this group then joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], using this ship for many other adventures.<ref name="Limping Lady" />
